subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! In this cherished age, this precious century of the Almighty Lord, women have become the crown upon the head of men [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله در این روزگار عزیز قرن حضرت رب عزیز قدیر نساء تاج رجال بر سر
subcodes.subjects: @equality of men and women, @firmness in the Covenant
